english translation text: Ziyarat Bibi Sakinah Bint Al- Husayn (AS)
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Alláh bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ سَيِّدِ الْاَنْبِيَاءِ
english translation text:
Peace be with you O granddaughter of the
master of the Prophets

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ صَحِبِ الْحَوْضِ وَالِّلوَاءِ
english translation text: Peace be with you O granddaughter of the owner of the heavenly fountain & the [divine] standard

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ صَاحِبَ الْمَقَامِ الْمَحْمُوْدِ
english translation text: Peace be with you O granddaughter of the one who is endowed with the praiseworthy rank

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَيْرِ خَلْقِ اللهِ
english translation text:
Peace be with you O granddaughter of the
best of the creation of God

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ يَعْسُوْبِ الدِّيْنِ
english translation text: Peace be with you O granddaughter of the chief of the religion

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ اَمِيْرِ الْمُؤمِنِيْنَ
english translation text: Peace be with you O granddaughter of the commander of the faithful

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ خَلِيْفَةِ سَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِيْنَ
english translation text:
Peace be with you O granddaughter of the successor of the master
of the Messengers

arabic text: اَلسَّلَامُ عَلَيْكِ يَا بِنْتَ فَاطِمَةَ الزَّهْرَاءِ
english translation text:
Peace be with you O granddaughter of
Fatima al-Zahra
Peace be with you O sister of the two martyrs
Peace be with you O daughter of the martyr
May the Mercy and Blessing of Allah be with you
